summary.efficiency_delta: with_skill uses fewer output chars on average

observations: All 6 assertions passed for both configurations across all evals; current assertion set is non-discriminating for this revision.
With-skill outputs show lower token proxy mean (10717 vs 11035, delta -318) and much lower variance (stddev 584 vs 1623).
Timing and real token telemetry were unavailable from subagent notifications in this environment; timing values are 0 and token values are proxied from output size.
recommendations: Add stricter assertions that test instruction-specific behavior (e.g., explicit placeholder validation block in report summary, deterministic dependency references).
Add at least one adversarial eval where plan/spec mismatch forces robust fallback behavior.
Capture real timing/tokens when notification telemetry becomes available to evaluate runtime cost accurately.
